payload.purpose_context: Generic 'install another tool' advice wastes user tokens and erodes trust in the analyzer when the user already has the right tool active. Phase A delivers an additive Go registry, tool-state model, and deterministic decision policy that emits at most one primary and one secondary recommendation, never stacking and never re-recommending an active tool. The output stays additive so the parallel issue #38 (fingerprint registry) and issue #39 (MCP/skill utilization) work can land independently and be wired in cleanly during Phase B.
payload.purpose_tldr: Build a deterministic, privacy-safe token-saving tool recommendation engine that diagnoses the dominant waste pattern and recommends the highest-impact next step while skipping tools already active.
